motivations: Centralize products, services, vendors, costs, and resale pricing
Reduce spreadsheet-based sourcing, pricing, and quoting work
pain_points: Supplier portals and price sheets are fragmented
Product and service costs are hard to combine into complete job pricing
Manual quote and catalog creation creates delays and margin errors
desired_outcomes: Automated cost, price, margin, catalog, and quote generation

motivations: Share customer-specific catalogs or price books
pain_points: Limited confidence in margins and approved offerings
desired_outcomes: Reliable catalog and price book access

motivations: Standardize vendor, product, service, and production cost intake
Control availability, lead time, and vendor performance data
Maintain clean source data for quoting and catalog outputs
pain_points: Manual updates when vendor prices or availability change
desired_outcomes: Visible vendor performance and availability status

motivations: Forecast profit across quotes, bundles, catalogs, and vendors
pain_points: Hidden labor, shipping, packaging, setup, and service costs
Difficulty comparing margins by vendor or offering
desired_outcomes: Margin alerts and minimum profit thresholds

motivations: Access assigned catalogs, price books, and quote request workflows
pain_points: Unclear available products, services, or pricing
desired_outcomes: Secure access to approved customer-facing offerings

system_touchpoints: Catalog, price book, quote, and proposal generation

user_needs.need: Import and normalize supplier products and services into a consistent internal asset model.
Calculate complete product, service, labor, shipping, packaging, setup, and installation costs before resale pricing.
Generate customer-ready catalogs, price books, quotes, and proposals from approved offerings.

assumptions.assumption: The first release serves one business workspace at a time, with simple internal roles before enterprise department access controls, SSO, and full audit governance.

source_trace.evidence: User roles inferred from vendor aggregation, pricing, quoting, customer management, collaboration, and enterprise features.
